examples: You'll find their uniforms tend to be more subdued pastel colors, such as mauve, green or blue.
Not to be outdone, England's Queen Victoria also appeared in public wearing a mauve gown, thus making it all the rage in England as well.
It bears clusters of mauve flowers in early summer.
In recent years, increasing numbers of Mauve Stinger jellyfish in the Mediterranean have posed a danger for swimmers.
My mother had drawn the heavy mauve curtains across the windows and I was lying in the dark.
